channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Researchers test video game as anxiety treatment for teens
item.description: For many teenagers, anxiety goes beyond occasional stress, affecting school, friendships, and daily life.

item.title: To trial or not to trial: Veteran vaccine advisers say vaccine clinical trials alone don't tell whole story
item.description: Two experienced vaccine policy advisers argue that excluding well-designed observational studies is a mistake.

item.title: Federal housing assistance may protect young children from lead exposure
item.description: A new study in Environmental Epidemiology suggests federal housing aid may reduce lead exposure in young children.

item.title: What Is Cyclosporiasis? The Parasite Behind the Latest Outbreak
item.description: Health officials investigate a multistate outbreak of this parasitic infection; learn its symptoms and spread.
